WORKING HARD FOR NORTHFIELD
Proud to be Labour MP for Allens Cross, Great Park, Kings Norton, Longbridge, New Frankley, Rednal, Rubery, Shenley, Weoley Castle, Weoley Hill, and West Heath

Working hard to represent you

Welcome

It is an honour to be elected as Birmingham Northfield’s Member of Parliament. I will work hard every day to repay the faith that has been placed in me.

You can use this website to find out about my work in Parliament and find contact details for casework support. You can also subscribe to a regular constituency newsletter.

Key links

Find constituency office details and get in contact

See if I can assist with casework and other issues
